title: TeleVision
description: A lightweight yet powerful mod that enhances gameplay with automatic night vision, single-player sleep functionality, and a comprehensive teleportation system with player-to-player teleport requests.
body:
[![Lightarue Hosting Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1210744/description_45293afd-81c5-4e69-aff0-25c907050440.png)](https://dathost.net/r/osama/minecraft-server-hosting)


TeleVision Mod adds essential utilities to enhance your Minecraft experience, perfect for both single-player and multiplayer servers!

✨ Key Features:

🌙 Night Vision:
- Automatic night vision effect without the annoying potion particles
- No more flickering - smooth transition guaranteed
- Fully configurable duration and refresh timing
- Can be disabled in config

😴 One Player Sleep:
- Skip the night with just one player sleeping
- Works perfectly in multiplayer
- No more waiting for all players to sleep
- Can be disabled in config

🌟 Advanced Teleportation System:
- Player-friendly teleport commands
- Safe teleportation with request & permission system
- Location memory system

📝 Commands:
- /sethome - Mark your home location
- /home - Teleport to your saved home
- /back - Return to your previous location
- /tpa <player> - Request to teleport to another player
- /tpaccept <player> - Accept a teleport request
- /tpdeny <player> - Deny a teleport request

⚙️ Fully Configurable:
- All features can be enabled/disabled
- Customizable cooldowns
- Adjustable request timeout
- Easy-to-use configuration file

💡 Server-Friendly:
- Lightweight implementation
- Perfect for multiplayer servers
- No client-side installation required
- Compatible with most other mods

🔧 Technical Requirements:
- Minecraft 1.21
- Forge Loader
- Java 17 or higher

📋 Installation:
1. Install Minecraft Forge for 1.21
2. Drop the mod file in your 'mods' folder
3. Run Minecraft and enjoy!

🔒 Safe & Secure:
- Permission-based teleport system
- Anti-spam cooldowns
- Request timeout system

Need support or have suggestions? Join our Discord or report issues on our instagram page !
